TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Larry_Bird, title = Larry_Bird, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Larry_Bird} }

S.FORM: Larry Bird nilacul Larry Bird nalecuhan ciniza i 12 a bulad 7 a demiad, 1956 a mihcaan. ci Larry Bird, u kawaw niza sa, u miunduay. u mimaliay ciniza i NBA nu Amilika. katukuh 2019 a mihcaan, enem a bataan izaw ku pitu ku mihcaan ciniza. u lumeniay a banges niza, u lumeniay a tademaw ciniza. namakayzaay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: r~…ĺarrj bird nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ r~…ĺarrj bird nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ¶iniza i ** a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶aan. ¶i r~…ĺarrj bird, u kawaw niza sa, u miunduaj. u mimar~…ĺiaj ¶iniza i nba nu amir~…ĺika. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, …ôn…ôm a bataan izaw ku pitu ku mińß ¶aan ¶iniza. u r~…ĺum…ôniaj a baŇč…ôs niza, u r~…ĺum…ôniaj a tad…ômaw ¶iniza. namakajzaaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan r~…ĺists of nationar~…ĺ bask…ôtbar~…ĺr~…ĺ asso ¶iation pr~…ĺaj…ôrs
